'''Blizzard Scout 1''' was a prototype [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] and serving in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army's]] [[Blizzard Force/Legends|Blizzard Force]] unit by [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Blizzard Scout 1, with [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Arnet]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Igar/Legends|Igar]] operating the walker, participated in the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], during which Blizzard Force invaded the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. The battle ended with an Imperial victory over with Alliance, and Arnet and Igar survived.

==Description==
Manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]],<ref name="ATSTitDB" /> Blizzard Scout 1 was a prototype<ref name="Arnet CCG">{{CCG|set=Endor Limited|cardname=Lieutenant Arnet}}</ref> enclosed [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] serving in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|army]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] fought between the Empire and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="CCG" /> Blizzard Scout 1 was modified for cold weather [[Ground warfare/Legends|combat]],<ref name="CCG" /> and its crew consisted of a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==History==
[[File:Blizzard_Scout_1_-_TESB.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Blizzard Scout 1 walks past Luke Skywalker during the Battle of Hoth.]]
By [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Blizzard Scout 1 was attached to the Empire's [[Blizzard Force/Legends|Blizzard Force]] unit,<ref name="CCG" /> and was occupied by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Arnet]]<ref name="Arnet CCG" /> and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Igar/Legends|Igar]].<ref name="CSWE Blizzard">{{CSWECite|I|79|Blizzard Force}}</ref> In 3 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], the Empire discovered [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]], the Alliance's hidden [[Alliance High Command/Legends|headquarters]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], leading to a [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|ground invasion]] of the facility.<ref name="NEC" /> [[General/Legends|General]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]], Blizzard Force's [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]], led the ground assault.<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref>

Arnet operated Blizzard Scout 1<ref name="Arnet CCG" /> during the battle, where the All Terrain Scout Transport provided flanking support and cover [[Laser/Legends|fire]] for Blizzard Force's [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]] and [[cold assault stormtrooper]]s.<ref name="CSWE Blizzard" /> Blizzard Scout 1 was walking near the All Terrain Armored Transport [[Blizzard 4/Legends|Blizzard 4]] when Alliance Commander [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] destroyed the latter walker.<ref name="ESB" /> Igar<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref> and Arnet survived the battle,<ref name="Arnet CCG" /> which ended in an Imperial victory over the Alliance.<ref name="ESB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Blizzard Scout 1 first appeared in the [[1980]] [[original trilogy]] film, {{Film|V}},<ref name="ESB" /> with its scene filmed at [[Elstree Studios]]'s stage 2 between [[July 25]] and [[July 27]], [[1979]].<ref name="Making">''[[The Making of The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref> In [[1996]], the Blizzard Scout 1 name was coined by a card for the ''[[Hoth Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]], though the image used was not an ''Empire Strikes Back'' film still.<ref name="CCG" /> The [[1998]] ''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' CD-ROM later identified Blizzard Scout 1 as an All Terrain Scout Transport from ''The Empire Strikes Back''.<ref name="BtM">''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]''</ref>
